title: Segfault in code generated by Verilator
body:
--- Author Name: **Clifford Wolf** (@cliffordwolf) Original Redmine Issue: 765 from https://www.veripool.org Original Date: 2014-05-12 Original Assignee: Wilson Snyder (@wsnyder) --- Verilator 5f5a3db creates C code that segfaults for a=128. ```module issue_043(a, y); input signed [7:0] a; output [15:0] y; assign y = {3{{~22'd0}}} <<< {4{a}}; endmodule ``` Self-contained test case:
http://svn.clifford.at/handicraft/2014/verilatortest/test014.v
http://svn.clifford.at/handicraft/2014/verilatortest/test014.cc
http://svn.clifford.at/handicraft/2014/verilatortest/test014.sh
